      You will read short word analogy prompts and type or select answers.

      Are there risks?

      This study involves minimal risk, no greater than ordinary online activity.

      Do I have to participate?

      No. Participation is voluntary. You may stop at any time.

      How will my data be used?

      Your responses will be used for research purposes. Do not include any personal or identifying information in your answers.

      you are at least 18 years old,
      you understand the information above, and
      you agree to participate in this study.
